scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-bold text-white
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight uppercase font-bold text-white

push_to_talk_button.default_state: w-40 h-40 rounded-full bg-[#1A1A1C] border-4 border-[#39FF14]/30 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.1)] flex items-center justify-center transition-all

map_markers.user: Neon Cyan (#00F0FF) glow dot with directional arrowhead

drive_mode_card.style: bg-[rgba(26,26,28,0.7)] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6
drive_mode_card.layout: Large touch targets, minimal text, high contrast icons, designed for peripheral vision (CarPlay friendly)

tab_bar.style: bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/5 h-20 pb-4 pt-2 flex justify-around

media_player.container: bg-[#1A1A1C] rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4

navigation.name: Map
navigation.purpose: Live map with hazards and peers

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native app. Apply Tailwind utility styling concepts (e.g., via NativeWind) or translate them to React Native StyleSheet.
Ensure the Walkie-Talkie (Talk) tab has a massive, highly tactile PTT (Push-To-Talk) button that dominates the screen. Use React Native's Pressable with scale animations on press.
Drive Mode MUST have extremely large touch targets to ensure safety and CarPlay readiness. Minimize reading, maximize iconography.
Map UI should use a dark style URL or standard dark mode configuration. The markers must visually pop like neon lights (use SVGs or highly saturated custom view markers).
For the audio interface, mock a sleek, glassmorphic player bridging Spotify/Apple Music aesthetics with the tactical car theme.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST include data-testid attributes for testing (e.g., data-testid='ptt-button', data-testid='tab-map').
